ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., linear regression, random forest) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., active, archived, in development) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store hyperparameters in a more structured format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., accuracy, F1 score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used to evaluate the model */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value used for binary classification metrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was recorded */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version that the metric belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the dataset */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in MB or GB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., learning rate, number of trees) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the parameter was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store hyperparameters in a more structured format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset version in MB or GB */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset version (e.g., CSV, Parquet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model that was evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the evaluation was performed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the evaluation */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model version that was evaluated */,
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version used for evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_type" TEXT /* Type of evaluation (e.g., training, validation, test) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_dataset_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_version_id") REFERENCES dataset_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
